item.title: Invisible Eyeliner Tip for Hooded Eyes
item.description: The "invisible" eyeliner is a game changer for hooded eyes. It adds definition without stealing your precious lid space

media:content.media:description: The "invisible" eyeliner is a game changer for hooded eyes. It adds definition without stealing your precious lid space

item.title: Why Puppy Eyeliner Looks So Cute On Hooded Eyes
item.description: Have you tried the Puppy eyeliner on hooded eyes? In todays tutorial, I'm showing you how to do a puppy liner and why it looks so cute on hooded eyes or any eyes for that matter.

media:content.media:title: Why Puppy Eyeliner Looks So Cute On Hooded Eyes
media:content.media:description: Have you tried the Puppy eyeliner on hooded eyes? In todays tutorial, I'm showing you how to do a puppy liner and why it looks so cute on hooded eyes or any eyes for that matter.
